title: Adventum Fabric
description: Adventum is a client-side modpack focusing on exploration and ambience.
body:
Adventum is a modpack with 100+ mods that aims to enhance the vanilla experience while still allowing you to play on vanilla servers, and without degrading performance.

  • Enhanced Visuals
  • Graphics presets
  • More sound effects
  • Better ambience
  • Proximity voice chat
  • Better worldgen in all 3 dimensions
  • New structures
  • Better animations with fresh animations
  • Custom player models and capes
  • Better chat


and so much more!

more information can be found on the wiki.

Attributions:

Effective: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective
